{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Hound access
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Suriel]] has unrestricted [[Hound access]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
